items.to: When does the meeting start?
It starts at eleven o'clock.

items.from: El tudod küldeni ma a dokumentumot?
items.to: Can you send the document today?
I will send it in a few minutes.
I am busy right now.
Let's talk later.
Could you help me with this?
I forgot my password.
Can you reset it?
The internet is very slow today.
My connection keeps dropping.
Call me when you are free.
I am on my way.
I will be a little late.
What are your plans for the weekend?
I want to relax at home.
I would like to pay by card.
How much does it cost?
It is too expensive for me.
I will send you the address.
